calendar.matters:
Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Teresa Thong, Esq. 562-436-2000 Keesal, Young & Logan for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

Hearing is held. Ms. Tong submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER WELLS FARGO CLEARING SERVICES, LLC's Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs

Petitioner's unopposed "motion for attorneys' fees and costs and prejudgment interest on award" is granted. Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: RIchard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Teresa Thong, Esq. 562-436-2000 Keesal Young & Logan for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER WELLS FARGO CLEARING SERVICES, LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award

Petitioner's unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
